heading: dns
body:
Atlas Functions support the [dns](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/dns.html) module with the following **exceptions**:

- Atlas Functions do **not** support the [dns Promises API](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/dns.html#dns_dns_promises_api)

- Atlas Functions do **not** support [resolver.cancel()](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/dns.html#dns_resolver_cancel)
